codeReview.summary: All three cleanup targets successfully removed: AntigravityManager/ directory (unrelated Electron project), skills/qris-payment/ (deprecated old endpoint), and state/orders-expired/6285157634464_expired_2026-04-07.json (stale test data with old schema fields: name instead of menuName, qty instead of quantity, string shareloc instead of object). Commit a51d6ef correctly shows 3 files changed, 141 deletions. All validation assertions (VAL-CLEAN-001, VAL-CLEAN-002, VAL-CLEAN-005) are fulfilled.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The config-worker skill file does not exist at .factory/skills/config-worker/SKILL.md. However, the transcript skeleton shows the worker invoked config-worker skill and followed a reasonable cleanup procedure (verify existence, delete, verify deletion). If this skill is expected to exist per features.json skillName field, it may be missing from the repository.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json specifies skillName: 'config-worker' but cat .factory/skills/config-worker/SKILL.md returns 'No such file or directory'. The worker still completed the task by using direct tool invocations (rm, ls, find).

summary: Feature successfully removes all three deprecated assets. AntigravityManager/ directory and skills/qris-payment/ directory are confirmed deleted. The expired order file with old schema (name, qty, string shareloc) has been removed. No old schema files remain in state/orders-expired/ (only README.md exists there). One minor observation: config-worker skill file is referenced but not present at the expected path.
